zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes la Zouche於1207年10月9日出生在英國英格蘭戴文諾斯 莫爾頓時，他的父親Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby26歲，母親Margaret Bisset28歲。他於大約1268年與Millicent de Cantilupe在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1279年6月25日之前在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Georges, Adrien.
from Old French bosche ‘large bundle of firewood’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a seller of such bundles.

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Eade , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Eade
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a nickname from a word denoting something round and lumpish. It is one of several given names that owe their origin to their use for a character in  Margaret Mitchell's  novel Gone with the Wind (  1936 ).

variants.name: Edes
meanings: This name is found as a variant or pet form of Edith in Yorkshire from the 15th century onwards. It is recorded as a baptismal name in the 16th century. In present-day use it probably refers to the biblical ‘Garden of Eden’, crew ῾eden ‘place of pleasure’. As a boy's name it may also represent a variant of Aidan or a transferred use of a surname, itself derived in the Middle Ages from a given name Edun or Edon. This is of Old English origin, from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + hūn ‘bear cub’.

variants.name: Edds
meanings: Pet form of any of several old German names beginning with Ed-. The Elder and Younger Eddas are also the names of two influential Old Icelandic books of Norse myths and poems.

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes la Zouche was born on 9 October 1207, in North Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Bisset, was 28. He married Millicent de Cantilupe about 1268, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 25 June 1279, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes la Zouche est né le 9 octobre 1207, à North Molton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bisset, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Millicent de Cantilupe environ 1268, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 25 juin 1279, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애쉬비 데 라 즈우치

ko.lifeSummary: Eudes la Zouche(이)가 1207년 10월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 노르스 모턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bisset(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1268년 영국에서 Millicent de Cantilupe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1279년 6월 25일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 사망했다.

pt.9 October 1207–Bef 25 June 1279: 9 de outubro de 1207–antes 25 de junho de 1279
pt.North Molton, Devon, England: North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Ashby-de-la-Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes la Zouche nasceu em 9 de outubro de 1207, em North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bisset, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Millicent de Cantilupe aproximadamente 1268, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 25 de junho de 1279, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ashby-de-la-Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes la Zouche родился 9 октября 1207 г. в местности норт молтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bisset, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Millicent de Cantilupe около 1268 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 25 июнь 1279 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eudes la Zouche nació el 9 de octubre de 1207, en North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Bisset, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Millicent de Cantilupe aproximadamente 1268, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 25 de junio de 1279, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
